series_metadata.series_description: These paper and electronic records relate to consumer complaints made against savings and loan associations regulated by the Ohio Division of Financial Institutions under Chapters 1151., 1153., 1155., and 1157. of the Ohio Revised Code. In addition, these records include correspondence relating to the consumer complaint.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files for five (5) years after date consumer complaint matter is closed, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
